name: Krashimals
short_description: Krashimals is a fast-paced multiplayer kart racing game where up to 4 players race through wacky tracks like Mushy Mountains and Gnome Garden. Collect coins, animal-powered abilities, customize your racer with hats, karts, and wheels, and race to victory in chaotic, fun-filled challenges!
detailed_description:
Krashimals is a fast-paced, chaotic racing game where you and your friends crash, dash, and boost your way to victory! Pick your favorite wacky animal driver, customize your look, and speed through vibrant tracks filled with boost pads, tricky shortcuts, and hidden secrets.

Welcome to Krashimals!

Now featuring customization, you can personalize your Krashimal with unique hats, characters, and vehicles! Want to race as a wizard-hat-wearing frog on a flying carpet? Or maybe a snail rocking a Spartan helmet in a bathtub? The choice is yours! With fun options like a traffic cone, cardboard box, and even a shopping 'kart', there’s no shortage of ways to express your style.

Use powerful abilities to outmaneuver your rivals—zip past them with a speed boost, send them flying with a well-timed impact, or find secret paths that give you the ultimate edge. Every race is unpredictable, with creative map designs that reward skill, exploration, and a little bit of mayhem.

Features:
🚀 Fast & Fun Racing – Use boost pads, abilities, and clever shortcuts to speed past your competition.
🏁 Exciting Tracks – Race across colorful, unique maps filled with surprises and hidden areas.
🐾 Crazy Animal Drivers – Play as a cat, snail, elephant, frog, or duck!
🎩 Customize Your Look – Choose from hats like a Spartan helmet, wizard hat, or traffic cone.
🚗 Wild Vehicles – Ride in a carpet, bathtub, shopping 'kart', or cardboard box!
⚡ Abilities & Power-ups – Master 8 different abilities to gain the upper hand.
🎉 Multiplayer Madness – Compete against friends for the ultimate racing glory!

Get ready to crash, customize, and compete in Krashimals! 🚀

Developer Note:

I'm a solo developer, and I’ve put Krashimals into Early Access because I want to keep improving the game with your help! I’m actively working on new features, polish, and content, and your feedback is incredibly important in shaping the future of Krashimals. Whether it’s ideas for new maps, customization options, or gameplay tweaks, I’d love to hear from you as the game continues to evolve!
